column3: Greene County Treasurer - Delinquent Tax Division
column9: No standing online auction list; become Sheriff sales. Volume surged ~20 to ~200 cases/yr. Call Delinquent Tax Div.

column3: Greene County Auditor (+ Treasurer search app)
column9: Best FTM source. Delinquent Tax Search lists/downloads full list, ~weekly refresh. Easiest bulk grab. URL updated 2026-06-16: original www.greeneauditor.org no longer resolves; live probe found replacement at auditor.greenecountyohio.gov behind Azure WAF (not Cloudflare) — adapter will need Playwright transport when implemented.

column3: City of Beavercreek - Code Enforcement (SmartGov portal)
column9: Beavercreek runs SmartGov public portal - searchable case data online. Best of 3 cities. NOTE: City != Township.

column3: Xenia Code Enforcement; Fairborn Property Maintenance
column4: Xenia 107 E Main St; Fairborn 44 W Hebble Ave
column9: No public bulk export for Xenia/Fairborn; request case/fine lists via city records request.

column3: City code enforcement + Greene County Public Health (nuisance/demo)
column9: No standing register. Xenia repealed Vacant Bldg Registration in 2022. Request orders per city; GCPH handles demo.
Official Record Search since 1984; index free, images may have fees. Filter by doc type. No confirmed bulk download.

column3: Recorder (tax liens) + Clerk of Courts (judgment liens)
column4: Recorder 69 Greene St; Clerk 45 N Detroit St, Xenia
column9: Tax liens at Recorder; judgment liens docketed at Common Pleas Clerk. Two offices = two pulls.

column3: City of Xenia - Utility Billing Division
column9: Internal disconnect list exists (30-day past-due -> notice). Not published; request via FOIA. Xenia only.

column3: Xenia 'One Stop Shop'; Greene Co. Building Regulation (unincorp.)
column9: Xenia in-house permitting app. No confirmed public status search; request open/expired list.

column3: Xenia Municipal Court + Fairborn Municipal Court
column4: Xenia 101 N Detroit St; Fairborn 1148 Kauffman Ave
column9: Both have public online case search. Search FED case type, aggregate by plaintiff. Two portals cover county.

column3: Greene County Recorder; Ohio AG / ODM Estate Recovery
column9: Primarily post-death estate claim via probate. Recorded liens limited. Marginal standalone source.
